channel.title: Datafibers Community on DataFibers
channel.description: Recent content in Datafibers Community on DataFibers

item.title: Demystifying Open-CLAW: Under the Hood of Cloud Native Application Lifecycle Management
item.description: The cloud-native landscape is a dizzying array of tools and abstractions. While Kubernetes orchestrates our containers, managing the full lifecycle of complex applications – from development to deployment, scaling, and upgrades – presents its own set of challenges. This is where Open-CLAW, a project aiming to standardize and simplify Cloud Application Lifecycle Automation, steps into the spotlight. Forget generic overviews; today, we’re diving deep into the architectural patterns and practical implementation hurdles of Open-CLAW.
